CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: AI Detects Potential Bounce Toward MA20 Amid Rising Stablecoin Supply
tldr_points: Price currently trades below MA20, indicating near-term bearish pressure.
Tether USAT supply surged 540% MoM, boosting overall crypto liquidity.
Institutional interest via Grayscale Hyperliquid ETF seed talks adds long-term bullish catalyst.
